Event: Snowbound Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 19/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR375
Snowy Hunt Gear

Once in a while, the unit tosses a boomerang at a random enemy unit. The boomerang bounces to each of the enemy units and deals pure damage equal to 180% of the armor wearer's attack to them. When the boomerang hits, the armor's wearer has a 40% chance to steal 20% of all stats from the target for 5 sec. Stacks up to 8 times. Upon impact, it also has a 60% chance to petrify the target for 4 sec. and tear through its armor. Petrified enemy units cannot move, and take 40% more damage. When a target's armor is torn, it receives 500000 pure damage, and their physical armor is reduced by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. This target also receives 450000 physical damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
